    Trump Coin Presale Launched on the Network (BNB)

    According to President Trump's instructions, users who will purchase the coin before its launch will receive one BNB coin as a gift.

    Therefore, after completing the purchase, the gift will be deposited into your wallet automatically.

    Before You Copy

    Transaction Private Note

    Please DO NOT store any passwords or private keys here. A private note (up to 100 characters) can be saved and is useful for transaction tracking.

    View All Transactions Private Notes
